---
title: "Introduction to recetox.aplcms"
author: "Helge Hecht"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Overview

`recetox.aplcms` provides adaptive processing tools for liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (LC-MS) metabolomics data. This package extends the original adaptive peak detection algorithm with enhanced capabilities for high-resolution MS data from both LC and GC applications.

## Key Features

- **Adaptive Peak Detection**: Automatically detects peaks without manual parameter tuning
- **Feature Alignment**: Aligns features across multiple samples
- **Noise Reduction**: Advanced filtering to remove background noise
- **Two-Step Hybrid Methods**: Combines multiple detection strategies for improved sensitivity
- **High Resolution Support**: Optimized for modern high-resolution mass spectrometers

## Installation

Install from GitHub:

```r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("RECETOX/recetox-aplcms")
```

## Quick Start

```r
library(recetox.aplcms)

# Load raw data
data <- load.lcms("path/to/file.mzML")

# Run two-step hybrid processing
result <- two.step.hybrid(data,
                          min_pres = 0.5,
                          min_run = 3,
                          max_run = 30)

# Extract features
features <- result$feature_table
```

## Workflow

The typical processing workflow includes:

1. **Data Loading**: Import raw MS files using `load.lcms()`
2. **Profile Generation**: Create intensity profiles from raw data
3. **Peak Detection**: Use adaptive or hybrid methods for feature detection
4. **Alignment**: Align detected features across samples
5. **Aggregation**: Group features into coherent compounds
6. **Export**: Write results to standard formats

## Citation

If you use this package in your research, please cite:

```r
citation("recetox.aplcms")
```

## Further Resources

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/RECETOX/recetox-aplcms)
- [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/RECETOX/recetox-aplcms/issues)
- [Change Log](https://github.com/RECETOX/recetox-aplcms/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
